claims.summary: A connected socket and fresh valid telemetry must remain distinguishable.
claims.disposition: Verified connection-perception state, valid-payload times, stale windows, and cadence/content evidence.

claims.summary: Receive-loop pipeline, lock wait, and lock hold should be separately measurable.
claims.disposition: Verified current bounded telemetry integration health evidence.

claims.summary: An open but silent WebSocket should be observed as stale hearing.
claims.disposition: Routed to a no-induction liveness fixture and runtime observation using current stale-evidence fields.

claims.summary: The receiver should force disconnect when valid telemetry is silent.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 reconnect and live sensory behavior wait.

claims.summary: The receiver should downsample or pressure-buffer telemetry when mode packing rises.
claims.disposition: Preserved as a Tier 5 sensory admission and pressure-control wait.
